svg.aria-label: Formloom demo: chat only vs Formloom form for a multi-field job application, 20-second loop.
svg.title: Formloom demo: plain chat vs structured form
svg.desc: A 20-second looping comparison. Left: an LLM tries to collect name, email, employment type, day rate, skills, and a resume by chat; it hits a validation error on the email and is still fighting about file upload at 20 seconds. Right: the same intake handed to a Formloom form, where a conditional day-rate field appears when Contract is picked, skills become chips, the resume is a file attachment, and the whole thing submits in roughly 15 seconds.
svg.text: LLM collects structured data through a plain chat
Same intent, handed off to a structured form

g.text: Set up a weekly 1:1 with Sarah next Tuesday 2pm.
Got it. I'll need her email for the invite.
That looks incomplete. Is it @acme.com or @acme.co?
And how long should the meeting be?
Last one, for how many weeks should it run?
Let me put that in a form for you:
Invite sent to sarah@acme.co for 4 weeks.
